description: Adversarial garment stress set for the virtual-try-on pipeline. Images live in eval/stress/refs/ (gitignored; user-supplied, treated as local stress assets, NOT catalog items). Each entry is BOTH the difficulty analysis (deliverables #1/#2) and the input to eval/stress_eval.py. `type` uses the EXPANDED clothing taxonomy added this iteration (top/dress/trousers/skirt/jacket/set). `layer`: 'replace' = swap the matching garment; 'over' = put on OVER existing clothing (outerwear). `primary_stress` names the pipeline stage each garment most stresses.

items.name: Cherry-Blossom Zip Hoodie
items.materials: soft pink cotton-fleece body; brown sherpa-lined hood interior; embroidered cherry-blossom branch
items.construction: oversized zip-up hoodie, drawcord hood, kangaroo pocket, ribbed cuffs and hem; pink sakura branch embroidery across left chest and sleeve
items.coverage: covers torso and arms over the existing top; lower body, legs and shoes stay exactly as in the photo
hard_because: outerwear worn OVER a tee, not a swap
predicted_failures: pipeline treats it as a top-swap and deletes the tee instead of layering
hood interior rendered as solid pink

items.name: Denim Track Jacket
items.materials: light-wash denim; ribbed knit collar/cuffs/hem; grosgrain stripe trim
items.construction: stand/mandarin collar, center-front frog-knot button closures, 3-stripe trim down both sleeves, trefoil logo on right chest, side pockets
items.coverage: covers torso and arms over the existing top; lower body stays as in the photo

items.name: Pink Ombre Beaded Mini Dress
items.materials: allover micro-bead/sequin embellishment, silver-to-pink vertical ombre, on a fitted base
items.construction: square neckline, thick straps, fitted bodice and short skirt, front side slit
items.coverage: covers torso to upper thigh (mini); shoulders, arms and legs below mid-thigh stay bare and visible
hard_because: ombre gradient direction must be preserved
predicted_failures: beads flattened to printed texture (loses sparkle)

items.name: Lilac Floral One-Shoulder Mini
items.materials: smooth jersey with a printed lilac iris/floral pattern on white
items.construction: asymmetric one-shoulder neckline, single strap, fitted mini
items.coverage: covers torso to upper thigh; one shoulder and both arms bare; legs below mini bare
hard_because: asymmetric one-shoulder (one shoulder bare, one covered)

items.name: Orchid-Appliqué Satin Gown
items.materials: ivory satin (anisotropic sheen); 3D white orchid appliqués with gold centers; embroidered trailing stems/beads
items.construction: halter with thin crossing straps, fitted column bodice, floor-length skirt with side slit
items.coverage: covers torso to floor (maxi); shoulders/upper back bare; the floor-length hem will reach the ankles/shoes
predicted_failures: hem erases legs/feet or floats above floor

items.name: Rosette-Strap Pink Mini
items.materials: matte pink stretch knit; 3D fabric rosette appliqués
items.construction: bodycon mini, 3D rosette flowers along the straps and one hip, ruched side
items.coverage: covers torso to upper thigh; arms and legs bare

items.name: Blush Corset Puff-Sleeve Top
items.materials: blush cotton/organza; sheer organza puff sleeves; metallic silver embroidered trim rows
items.construction: boned corset bodice, sweetheart neckline, center-front lace-up tie, short sheer puff sleeves, peplum flare hem
items.coverage: covers torso to waist with a short peplum; shoulders covered by sheer puff sleeves; midriff and below stay as in photo
hard_because: sheer organza puff sleeves (transparency over skin)
predicted_failures: peplum merged into a plain hem

items.name: Floral Corset Bustier
items.materials: structured satin with a small ditsy floral print
items.construction: boned bustier, sweetheart neckline, thin straps, fitted to the waist
items.coverage: covers the torso to the waist; arms and everything below the waist stay as in the photo

items.name: Polka-Dot Halter Midi
items.materials: cream cotton with regular black polka dots
items.construction: halter neckline, fitted bodice, A-line midi skirt
items.coverage: covers torso to mid-calf (midi); shoulders/back bare; lower legs and shoes stay visible
hard_because: regular polka-dot lattice (perspective/contour distortion shows instantly)
dot spacing must stay even over folds
predicted_failures: dots smear, change size, or lose alignment over the body

items.name: Ivory Bubble-Hem Off-Shoulder Mini
items.materials: ivory satin/taffeta (structured, glossy)
items.construction: off-shoulder bardot neckline, fitted bodice, dramatic puffball/bubble hem with built-in volume
items.coverage: covers torso to upper thigh as a balloon hem; both shoulders and upper arms bare; legs bare
hard_because: bubble/puffball hem = volume that does NOT follow the body (anti-bodycon)
predicted_failures: bubble hem collapsed into a normal flared skirt

items.name: Pink Satin Ruched Strapless
items.materials: pink satin (high sheen)
items.construction: strapless, asymmetric ruched bodice with a fabric rosette, draped tulip mini, side cascade
items.coverage: covers torso to upper thigh; shoulders and arms fully bare; legs bare
hard_because: satin specular highlights on heavy ruching

items.name: Pale-Yellow Floral Corset
items.materials: pale yellow with small floral print, boned
items.construction: boned corset top, straight neckline, thin straps
items.coverage: covers torso to waist; arms and below the waist stay as in the photo

items.name: Rose Paillette Mock-Neck Top
items.materials: oversized round flat paillettes (large disc sequins) in dusty rose; semi-sheer side panels
items.construction: high mock neck, sleeveless, slight peplum flare hem
items.coverage: covers torso to waist with a short flare; arms bare; below the waist stays as in the photo
hard_because: LARGE paillettes each a separate specular disc (extreme sparkle, classic AI tell)
predicted_failures: paillettes -> uniform glitter texture (loses individual discs and scene-matched speculars)
items.primary_stress: model (large specular elements) + compositing (grain match may flatten sparkle)

items.name: Celestial Beaded Denim Mini
items.materials: dark navy denim base; copper/bronze metallic beaded embroidery (celestial/zodiac motif)
items.construction: square neckline, thick straps, fitted mini with a front kick-pleat slit
items.coverage: covers torso to upper thigh; shoulders/arms bare; legs below the mini stay visible
hard_because: dark base + metallic beaded specular embroidery

items.name: Grommet Asymmetric Two-Piece
items.materials: charcoal jersey; large polished silver grommets/eyelets
items.construction: one-shoulder asymmetric crop top + matching mini skirt, with rows of large metal grommets along the diagonal raw edges; bare midriff
items.coverage: two pieces: crop top over the chest (one shoulder bare) and a mini skirt; the midriff between them, one arm/shoulder, and the legs stay bare and visible
hard_because: TWO separate garments (set) - no taxonomy support
predicted_failures: pieces merged into one dress (midriff covered)

items.name: Distressed Denim Moto Jacket
items.materials: charcoal distressed/frayed denim
items.construction: structured peaked-lapel moto jacket, asymmetric front zip, corset lace-up panels on the front with long dangling laces, cropped peplum back
items.coverage: covers torso and arms over the existing top; lower body stays as in the photo
predicted_failures: structure simplified to a plain jacket

items.name: Belt-Wrapped Distressed Jeans
items.materials: mid-wash distressed denim; leather belt/strap detail
items.construction: straight-leg jeans with a deconstructed belt/strap wrapped around the upper thigh and waist
items.coverage: covers waist to ankle; upper body and shoes stay as in the photo

items.name: Brown Paisley Wrap Mini Skirt
items.materials: brown fabric with a tonal paisley/leaf print
items.construction: asymmetric wrap mini skirt with a draped front overlap
items.coverage: covers the hips to upper thigh (mini); upper body unchanged; legs below the skirt stay visible
hard_because: SKIRT type (no taxonomy support - would map to trousers and grow legs)

items.name: Banded Sequin-Hem Ruffle Mini Skirt
items.materials: layered translucent chiffon in horizontal color bands (cream/yellow/coral/red); large red & yellow paillette sequins + organza ruffle at the hem
items.construction: tiered ruffle mini skirt, horizontal banded colorway, sequin-and-ruffle hem
items.coverage: covers hips to upper thigh; upper body unchanged; legs below stay visible
hard_because: horizontal color-band order must be preserved

items.name: Embellished Distressed Bootcut Jeans
items.materials: dark-wash denim; studs/embellishment; heavy distress and rips
items.construction: low-rise bootcut jeans, ripped knees, embellished detailing
items.coverage: covers waist to floor (bootcut over the shoe); upper body stays as in the photo

items.name: Beaded Fringe Sheer Mini Skirt
items.materials: sheer mauve mesh; purple 3D bead-flower embroidery; beaded fringe/tassel hem
items.construction: sheer mesh mini skirt with floral beadwork and a dangling beaded fringe hem
items.coverage: sheer skirt over the hips/upper thigh - skin shows through the mesh; upper body unchanged; legs below visible
